cases.request: I need a refund for my damaged order. Order number is ORD-5521. The screen is cracked.
cases.notes: Standard damage replacement — should resolve autonomously with photo evidence

cases.request: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. My account email is jane.doe@example.com.
cases.notes: Billing duplicate — clear evidence, should resolve autonomously

cases.request: I want to return something I bought 6 months ago. I know it's past your 30-day policy but I feel it should be honored.
cases.notes: Policy exception — outside return window, requires human decision

cases.request: I need to speak with a real person right now. This is unacceptable.
cases.notes: Explicit customer demand for human — must NOT attempt to resolve first

cases.request: My order ORD-7832 was supposed to arrive last Tuesday but still hasn't shown up. I need this resolved TODAY.
cases.expected_outcome: Shipping delay refund or replacement issued
cases.notes: Confirmed non-delivery — within policy to resolve autonomously

cases.request: I saw the same item on a competitor's site for $20 less. Can you match that price?
cases.expected_outcome: Escalated — policy gap (policy only covers own-site price matching)
cases.notes: Policy is silent on competitor price matching — escalate, do not interpret/assume

cases.request: I returned my item 3 weeks ago but haven't received my refund yet. Order was ORD-4410.
cases.notes: Return confirmed in system, refund not processed — straightforward fix

cases.request: I received the wrong item entirely. I ordered a blue jacket size M but got a red shirt size XL.
cases.expected_outcome: Wrong item — full refund or replacement issued
cases.notes: Wrong item fulfillment — agent can resolve with photo evidence

cases.request: Hi, I'm Alex Smith. I need help with my recent order.
cases.expected_outcome: Request additional identifier — multiple customers named Alex Smith
cases.notes: Multiple customer matches — must ask for email or order number, NOT select heuristically

cases.request: I have two issues: first my ORD-9901 arrived damaged, and second I was billed the wrong amount on my last invoice.
cases.expected_outcome: Both issues resolved in single interaction
cases.notes: Multi-concern request — decompose, handle each in parallel, synthesize unified response

cases.request: I want a refund of $750 for the business losses I incurred because your product failed.
cases.notes: Refund exceeds automated threshold — programmatic hook must block and escalate

cases.request: My account has been locked and I can't log in. I have orders pending.
cases.expected_outcome: Escalated — account access issue beyond refund agent scope
cases.notes: Account access issues are beyond this agent's tool scope
